## 📋 Task Description
A concise description of the task and what architectural components it changes.

## 🛠️ Proposed Changes
*   [ ] Component 1 (e.g. `backend/app/api/...`)
*   [ ] Component 2 (e.g. `frontend/src/...`)

## 📋 Specific Checklist

- [ ] Task sub-item 2
- [ ] Task sub-item 3

## 🧪 Verification Plan
Describe how these changes will be verified:
- [ ] Automated tests / API requests
- [ ] Manual browser check
